title: 4 Squeezy Bead Pastel Pineapples - Fun Soft Fidget Toy, Stress Relief, Novelty Party Bag Filler,s Sensory Stimulation, Fruit Squishies, Toys for Autism ASD ADHD Hand Therapy
features: 🍍🤩🍍🎉 TERRIFIC TROPICAL SQUEEZE TOY - Stress relief has never been so fun and delightful! Let this fun fidget pineapple toy become your go-to companion for moments of tension and stress. With its comforting touch and tropical charm, this squeezable stress toy is here to make your day a little brighter, one squeeze at a time

🍍🤩🍍🎉 SQUEEZING SATISFACTION - Feeling overwhelmed or tense? We have the perfect solution! These amazing squishy fidget toys provides an immensely satisfying experience that is sure to soothe the senses and leave you in a relaxed state of mind! This squeezable pineapple toy is also a great end of term present for children who will love the brilliant lifelike design, and are sure to get endless hours of squeezing fun and play out of this squishy!

🍍🤩🍍🎉 STRESS RELIEF TOY FOR WORK HOME AND SCHOOL - This fidget toy can be transported easily in a pocket or handbag and is the perfect stress relief companion. Far more fun and vibrant than standard stress balls this stress toy can be placed on your desk and used throughout the day to help you refocus on your work or school tasks. Or use it at home to relieve some stress after a tough day. This fidget toy has endless uses!

🍍🤩🍍🎉 SAFETY TESTED AND CE APPROVED - Your safety is our top priority so we made sure that this product was made from high-quality materials. The product contains gel beads and carries a CE mark which means it meets rigorous health, safety and environmental protection requirements. This ensures the stress relief ball is durable and provides you with long-lasting enjoyment

🍍🤩🍍🎉 INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE – In each package you will receive four squeezy pineapples. This fun squeeze toy measures approximately 7 x 6 x 6cm (2.7 x 2.35 x 2.35) and provide a fantastic stress relief and sensory experience to both adults and children. Please Note: This product is not suitable for children under the age of 3 years old
